steps.t: Thurindol can be found at a small Ranger outpost hidden in the Slag-hills. You should show the orders to Thurindol.
Candúr can be found at a small Ranger outpost hidden in the Slag-hills. You should bring the orders to Candúr.
Thurindol can be found at a small Ranger outpost hidden in the Slag-hills. You should talk to Thurindol.
